setup.note: Google Workspace Gmail remote MCP server. Developer Preview. Enable Gmail API and Gmail MCP API in a Google Cloud project, configure the OAuth consent screen, add scopes https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.readonly and https://www.googleapis.com/auth/gmail.compose, then create a Google OAuth client and register FlexiGPT's OAuth redirect URL exactly. Use a fixed FlexiGPT loopback port before registration if needed. Reference: https://developers.google.com/workspace/gmail/api/guides/configure-mcp-server

inputs.label: Google OAuth Client
inputs.description: OAuth client ID and client secret from Google Auth Platform.
inputs.note: Register the FlexiGPT OAuth redirect URL exactly in Google Auth Platform.
